context: Tests whether the agent writes the brand vault to the canonical home-directory path (~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/<brand>/) rather than the current working directory or any arbitrary location. Also checks that the brand slug is correctly derived and that all required vault files are present at that path.

checklist.name: Vault under ~/.claude
checklist.description: The brand vault directory exists under ~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/ (i.e., files are created at ~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/<slug>/ — NOT in the current working directory or any other location)

checklist.name: Correct slug directory
checklist.description: The subfolder name is in kebab-case (all lowercase, words separated by hyphens, no spaces or uppercase) derived from the brand name

checklist.name: Slug in confirmation note
checklist.description: vault_confirmation.txt states the full path including ~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/<slug>/

checklist.name: voice.md present
checklist.description: voice.md exists inside the vault directory at the correct path

checklist.name: visual.md present
checklist.description: visual.md exists inside the vault directory at the correct path

checklist.name: palette.json present
checklist.description: palette.json exists inside the vault directory at the correct path

checklist.name: principles.md present
checklist.description: principles.md exists inside the vault directory at the correct path

checklist.name: audience.md present
checklist.description: audience.md exists inside the vault directory at the correct path

checklist.name: examples/ subfolder present
checklist.description: An examples/ subfolder exists inside the vault directory and contains at least one file (e.g., source-quotes.md)

checklist.name: source.json present
checklist.description: source.json exists inside the vault directory at the correct path
